description.task: Implement a BinaryTree class with insert (level-order insertion to maintain completeness), a method to find a node by value, and a method that checks if the tree is a valid binary search tree.
instructions: find(val): BFS with a queue; poll each node; if node.val==val return node; else add non-null children; return null if not found
isBSTHelper(node,min,max): if node==null return true; if node.val<=min||node.val>=max return false; return isBSTHelper(left,min,node.val)&&isBSTHelper(right,node.val,max)
insert is already implemented using level-order insertion
After inserting [5,3,8,1,4]: find(4) returns node with val=4, find(9) returns null
Valid BST example: 5 with {left=3{1,4}, right=8} → isBST=true. Invalid: right child 4 < root 5 → false
description.hint: isBSTHelper: if(node==null) return true; if(node.val<=min||node.val>=max) return false; return isBSTHelper(node.left,min,node.val)&&isBSTHelper(node.right,node.val,max);
description.expectedOutput:
Find 4: 4
Find 9: null
Is BST: true
Is BST (invalid): false

description.task: Implement a TreeTransforms class with methods to create a mirror (inverted) copy of a binary tree, check if a tree is symmetric (mirror of itself), and check if two trees are identical.
instructions: mirror(root): if null return null; swap left and right; then recursively mirror both; return root
isMirrorPair(a,b): if both null return true; if one null return false; return a.val==b.val && isMirrorPair(a.left,b.right) && isMirrorPair(a.right,b.left)
isIdentical(a,b): if both null true; if one null false; return a.val==b.val && isIdentical(left,left) && isIdentical(right,right)
Original inorder [4,2,5,1,3]; after mirror: right and left swapped so inorder becomes [3,1,5,2,4]
Symmetric tree: 1→{2{3,4},2{4,3}} → symmetric=true; original tree → false
description.hint: mirror: if(root==null)return null; Node tmp=root.left; root.left=root.right; root.right=tmp; mirror(root.left); mirror(root.right); return root;
description.expectedOutput:
Original inorder: 4 2 5 1 3 
Mirrored inorder: 3 1 5 2 4 
Symmetric: true
Symmetric(root): false

description.task: Implement a PathSum class with three methods: hasPathSum (check if any root-to-leaf path sums to target), findAllPaths (list all root-to-leaf paths), and maxPathSum (maximum sum of any root-to-leaf path).
instructions: dfs: if node==null return; path.add(node.val); if leaf add new ArrayList<>(path) to result; else recurse left and right; path.remove(path.size()-1) to backtrack
maxPathSum: if both children null return root.val; if only left exists: root.val + maxPathSum(left); if only right: root.val+right; if both: root.val + Math.max(maxPathSum(left), maxPathSum(right))
description.hint: maxPathSum: if(root.left==null) return root.val+maxPathSum(root.right); if(root.right==null) return root.val+maxPathSum(root.left); return root.val+Math.max(maxPathSum(root.left),maxPathSum(root.right));
description.expectedOutput:
Has path 22: true
Has path 26: false
All paths: [[5, 4, 11, 7], [5, 4, 11, 2], [5, 8, 13], [5, 8, 4, 1]]
Max path sum: 27
